name: Baked Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Bake potatoes until tender.
3. Melt butter in a medium saucepan.
4. Gradually blend flour with a wire whisk until thoroughly blended.
5. Slowly add milk to the butter-flour mixture, whisking constantly.
6. Whisk in salt and pepper; simmer over low heat, stirring constantly.
7. Scoop out potato flesh and set aside.
8. Chop potato skins and discard the remainder.
9. When the milk mixture is very hot, whisk in the potato flesh.
10. Add chopped green onions and potato skins.
11. Whisk well, then add sour cream and crumbled bacon.
12. Heat thoroughly until cheese is melted in.
13. Serve with crusty French Bread and fresh butter.
